name: Single Shelf Garment Rack Black Metal with Natural Wood - Brightroom™: Clothing & Coat Rack, Closet Storage Solution
description:
Simply stylish yet functional, this Metal Garment Rack with Natural Wood Shelf from Brightroom™ makes a perfect choice to help keep your mudroom or bedroom clutter-free and the items you wear daily easily accessible. This garment rack includes one shelf with one hanging rod for organizing clothes, shoes, bins and more. Crafted with a mix of powder-coated wood and metal with a natural black finish, this garment rack lends mixed-material style to your space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
